description_long: This is a robust wooden table with a rustic design, featuring a thick rectangular tabletop composed of several wide, dark-stained wooden planks. The table is supported by a single, solid central base made from a large, horizontally-oriented log, giving it a sturdy and grounded appearance. Two vertical supports connect the tabletop to the log base, providing stability and a distinctive silhouette. The wood grain and natural imperfections are visible, enhancing its rugged, handcrafted aesthetic. The table lacks any decorative carvings or embellishments, focusing on functional simplicity. Its construction and materials suggest it is well-suited for outdoor urban environments such as parks or picnic areas.
description: A sturdy, rustic wooden table with a thick plank top and a solid log base, designed for outdoor use. The natural wood grain and robust construction give it a handcrafted, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the narrow end, highlighting the thickness of the tabletop planks and the rounded log base.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the tabletop, the two vertical supports, and the log base's flat side.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end view shows the plank arrangement and the semi-circular profile of the log base.
description_view_3: Another side view, slightly darker, showing the length of the tabletop and the solid log base with visible wood grain.
attribute_number_of_legs: single central log base with two vertical supports
